x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback calculated as a percentage of the transaction amount.

Comment:
Example: 5% cashback on grocery purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A predefined cashback amount paid for qualifying transactions.

Comment:
Example: €10 cashback for spending over €100.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback rates that vary based on spending levels or customer tiers.

Comment
Example: 1% cashback up to €500 spend and 3% above €500.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Category-Based Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback applied only to specific spending categories.

Comment:
Example: 4% cashback on fuel purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant-Specific Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback offered for purchases with selected merchants or partners.

Comment:
Example: 10% cashback at a partner supermarket.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Temporary cashback offered during campaigns or promotional periods.

Comment:
Example: Double cashback during holiday sales.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback earned repeatedly on eligible ongoing transactions or subscriptions.

Comment:
Example: Monthly cashback on utility bill payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback granted only when specific conditions are met.

Comment:
Example: Cashback after maintaining a minimum account balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Welcome Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback offered to new customers after account opening or first usage.

Comment:
Example: €50 cashback after first opening account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instant Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback credited immediately at the time of purchase.

Comment:
Example: Cashback deducted directly from the payment amount.
